response.justification: Wei Chen has strong technical depth across multiple languages and domains, with clear experience in developer tooling, test automation, and CI/CD infrastructure, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, team leadership, or organizational change initiatives required for this managerial role, and mobile platform experience is only implied through iOS app maintenance.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, code generators, CI/CD systems)
Proven track record in test automation, TDD, and engineering productivity practices
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication via workshops and talks
concerns: No clear evidence of 3+ years in technical leadership or 2+ years in people management
Mobile platform experience limited to one iOS app takeover, not ecosystem-wide tooling
Lacks documented experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap planning
